entries.description: Built ai_router/copilot_preflight.py: staged binary->credential->live-probe auth check classified through the transport error_class taxonomy, injectable seams (which/credential-dir/spawner), CLI + JSON output.

Wired preflight into start_session before register_session_start: blocks a mis-authed copilot-cli seat; the live auth probe runs on EVERY start including idempotent re-entry (repo state is not proof of current seat auth; Round-2 fix removed the earlier re-entry skip); no-op on direct-API and --no-router; a missing model falls back to the module default rather than probing an empty --model.

Routed architecture decision (tier 3) on close fail-loud gate placement; ruled: ledger sub-check inside check_verification_integrity delegating to writer_discipline require_ledger, no_router NOT consulted. Saved raw.

Added require_ledger=True mode to writer_discipline (absent/empty ledger -> HIGH) and a ledger sub-check in check_verification_integrity (Full, non-manual; scoped to ledger-absence, short-circuits before the verdict axis).

Added verdict-token validation + normalization at the blessed writer: EXACT allowlist (canonical + shipped extension token ISSUES_FOUND_RESOLVED_IN_FLIGHT), case-insensitive; a prefix look-alike like VERIFIED_NOT_REALLY is rejected, not tolerated; accepted non-canonical spellings are canonicalized before persist; _flip_state_to_closed, register_typed_session_handoff and mark_session_complete all normalize (L-069-1 siblings); close_session.run blocks/normalizes before the success event. Rejects manual-override-development.
Decided one-shot repair-helper OUT (deferred per spec non-goal); manual remediation recipe recorded (re-verify via router, close via --repair, never a hand edit).
Added pytest: test_copilot_preflight (8), ledger-axis (5) and verdict-validation (5) in the gate/verdict suites, start_session preflight wiring (4); fixed _make_gate_set to carry a realistic ledger.
